body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features smooth, deep ocean-blue scales covering the skin, with gill slits along the neck blending seamlessly into the neck's contour. The flower on top of the head transforms into a large, vibrant bloom with five petals made of pearly white coral, glowing faintly with aquamarine light. The green leaves on the body are replaced by smooth, webbed fins extending from the shoulders and back, their edges shimmering with seafoam green. The curled tail tip now has fin-like extensions and a teal sheen, while the sharp teeth remain visible but are encased in a translucent, water-like coating.
signature_feature: Flower bloom: pearly white coral with aquamarine glow and subtle seafoam green edges.
